prompt:
这段 SQL 查询是干嘛的？我不太懂数据库：

```sql
SELECT 
    u.name,
    o.order_date,
    o.total
FROM users u
INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE o.total > 100
ORDER BY o.total DESC;
```

assertions.name: analogy-first-line
assertions.description: The explanation starts with an everyday analogy, not technical jargon

assertions.name: join-explained-with-analogy
assertions.description: The JOIN operation is explained using an everyday analogy (matching, pairing, merging)

assertions.name: no-jargon-in-intro
assertions.description: Avoids terms like 'relational database', 'normalization', 'foreign key', 'cartesian product' in the intro

assertions.name: step-by-step
assertions.description: Explains the query step by step rather than all at once
